ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dhb" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHB */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the DHB */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the DHB is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the DHB */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the DHB */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the DHB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination status entry */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB */,
  "at_least_partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people at least partially vaccinated */,
  "at_least_partially_vaccinated_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population at least partially vaccinated */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "fully_vaccinated_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the population fully vaccinated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the DHB */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_status_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhb ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination target */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB */,
  "at_least_partially_vaccinated_target" INTEGER /* Target number of people at least partially vaccinated */,
  "fully_vaccinated_target" INTEGER /* Target number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date by which the target should be achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_targets_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhb ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination progress entry */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB */,
  "at_least_partially_vaccinated_to_90" INTEGER /* Number of people needed to reach 90% partial vaccination */,
  "fully_vaccinated_to_90" INTEGER /* Number of people needed to reach 90% full vaccination */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_progress_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhb ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination (e.g., Pfizer, AstraZeneca) */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Status of vaccination (e.g., Partial, Full) */,
  "vaccination_batch" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "vaccination_center" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vaccination_type FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhb ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "nhf_number" TEXT /* NHF (National Health Index) number of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine type */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "doses_required" INTEGER /* Number of doses required for full vaccination */,
  "vaccine_description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine batch */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine type */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the vaccine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of doses in the batch */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of distribution */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB receiving the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_batches_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhb ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_batches_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the center */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhb ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination center */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  "reminder_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a reminder has been sent for the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_appointments_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_appointments_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the appointment */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the reminder (e.g., SMS, Email) */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., Sent, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_reminders_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_reminders_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES vaccination_appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the report template (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_fields" TEXT /* Fields to be included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report template */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File contents of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id")
)
